2001February 19, 2001

🇵🇹 Funchal, Portugal

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Funchal, Portugal, February 19, 2001 -- February 23, 2001

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2001-02-funchal-portugal

25 Resolutions

498Plenary
Appoint Gerry Radack as Convenor of WG 3
SC 4 approves the nomination of Gerry Radack as Convenor of the WG 3 to serve for a period of three years.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
497Plenary
Endorse publication of Part 28 as a Technical Specification
SC 4 endorses the following approach to publication of Part 28 as a Technical Specification: * the late binding and both early bindings will be kept in this version of the Tech. Spec. * provision f...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
496Plenary
Appoint Lothar Klein as Convenor of JWG 9
SC 4 appreciates and accepts the offer of Lothar Klein to serve as Convener of JWG 9.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
495Plenary
Appoint Dr. Wolfgang Wilkes as Convenor of WG 2
SC 4 appreciates and accepts the offer of Dr. Wolfgang Wilkes to serve as Convener of WG 2.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
494Plenary
Thank Bernd Wenzel for his efforts as Convenor of WG 10
SC 4 thanks Bernd Wenzel for his efforts within the whole SC 4 community and for his work to promote harmonization of activities in and around the work of SC 4, including his liaisons with ISO/TC 2...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
493Plenary
Thank Gerd Ehinger for his leadership of WG 2
SC 4 thanks Gerd Ehinger for his leadership of the work in WG 2 and wishes him all the best for his future.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
492Plenary
Cancel ISO 10303-231 and its associated ATS ISO 10303-331
SC 4 cancels ISO 10303-231, Application protocol: Process engineering data: Process design and process specifications of major equipment, and its associated Abstract Test Suite, ISO 10303-331.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
491Plenary
Appoint David Loffredo as Deputy Convenor of WG 11
SC 4 thanks David Price for his efforts as WG 11 Deputy Convenor and the STEP Modularization Project and appoints David Loffredo to serve as Deputy Convenor of its Working Group 11.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
490Plenary
Provide guidelines for publishing SC 4 standards using HTML
SC 4 welcomes the statement from ISO CS that SC 4 standards may now be published in HTML without any need for other digital formats such as PDF.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
489Plenary
Revise Publicly Available Specification to be Application Protocol 233
SC 4 directs the Part 233 project team to start the revision of the PAS defined in Resolution "Publicly available specification for systems engineering data representation", to be published as Appl...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
488Plenary
Publish AP 233 contents as Publicly Available Specification
SC 4 resolves that the current contents of AP 233 be published as a Publicly Available Specification "Reference Model for Systems Engineering" with a new ISO number.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
487Plenary
Adopt procedures for Externally Developed Specifications
SC 4 resolves to adopt the procedures described in ISO/TC 184/SC 4 N_Funchal 16 "Procedures For Transposing Externally Developed Specifications Into ISO Deliverables" as a standing document to enab...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
486Plenary
Clarify approval procedures in Quality Manual
SC 4 approves the changes to the SC 4 Quality Manual specified in document QC N186.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
485Plenary
Approve changes to the SC 4 Organization Handbook
SC 4 approves the changes to clause 5.11 of the SC 4 Organization Handbook (SC 4 N1087) described in document QC N178 and requests its Secretariat to make the corresponding change to clause 5.7.3.2.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
484Plenary
Apply procedure for using ASN.1 identifiers
SC 4 approves the procedure for using ASN.1 identifiers described in document QC N177.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
483Plenary
Define and manage Common Resources
SC 4 resolves that ISO 10303 Generic and Application Integrated Resources and Application Integrated Constructs are Common Resources.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
482Plenary
Approve new project leaders and editors for SC 4 projects
SC 4 approves the following new project leaders or project editors for the associated SC 4 projects: |=== |Project |Project Leader |Editor |10303-1001 |Gerry Graves | |10303-1002 |Gerry Graves |Dar...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

SC 4 thanks Bruno Schilli for his efforts within the whole SC 4 community and for his work as WG 3 Deputy Convenor and PPC member and wishes him all the best for his future.

Acclamation
SC 4 thanks Reinhard Nerke for his efforts for his work as JWG 9 Deputy Convenor and wishes him all the best for his future.

Acclamation
SC 4 thanks Jim Nell of ISO/TC 184/SC 5, for his conscientious and dedicated assistance for updating STEP on a Page (SOAP) for SC 4.

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
